expected_region.description: left hand returning the golden Mouton Cadet bottle to the shelf

event_gt.evidence: retail2 around 12-13s shows the Mouton Cadet bottle being put back on the shelf.

detail_gt.evidence: The bottle being put back has a visible Mouton Cadet label.

expected_region.description: second returned bottle, blue-cap Riunite Moscato bottle

event_gt.evidence: After returning Mouton Cadet, retail2 shows the blue-cap Riunite Moscato bottle as the second bottle being handled for return.

detail_gt.evidence: The second bottle has a visible Riunite Moscato label and blue cap.
